Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4C00 "SDI-4800-4C00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "SDI.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4800 which copies 512 bytes of data from $4820 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $4C00 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
